name: Dyna.Ai
oneliner: AI-as-a-Service platform delivering agentic AI solutions for banking and financial services
finserv: Specifically serves banking and financial services; agentic suite for financial institutions
team: Lion X Ventures led round; expanding to Saudi Arabia
thesis: Dyna.Ai shows agentic AI is going live in banking across Asia-Pacific and Middle East. Their platform approach could complement You's infrastructure layer in non-US markets.
